common.errorLoading: Could not load. Check your connection and try again.
common.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

offline.youAreOffline: You are offline — you can read saved content.
offline.draftsPending: {{count}} report(s) waiting to send when you are back online.

pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of Taarifu is available. Updating…

auth.tagline: Report issues. Track action. Connect with your representatives.
auth.enterPhoneHelp: We'll text you a verification code by SMS.
auth.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +255712345678).
auth.enterCodeHelp: Enter the numeric code you received by SMS.
auth.tierHint: You are at tier {{tier}}. You can report now; verify your ID to unlock more.
auth.staffUseConsole: This is a staff account. Please use the staff console.
auth.privacyNote: We protect your data under the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

feed.title: Welcome to Taarifu
feed.subtitle: News and issues from your area.

search.title: Search
search.label: Search Taarifu
search.prompt: Type to search representatives, organisations, announcements and public reports.

reps.title: My representative
reps.subtitle: Choose your ward to see your MP and Councillor.
reps.noMp: No MP found for this area.
reps.noCouncillor: No Councillor found for this ward.
reps.pickPrompt: Choose your Region, District and Ward above.

report.title: File a report
report.subtitle: Tell us the problem. It takes under two minutes.
report.sensitiveNote: This is a sensitive type. Reports will be private; you may report anonymously.
report.locationOptional: Optional. We only use it if you tap.
report.geoDenied: We could not get your location. You can continue without it.
report.geoUnavailable: Your device does not allow location.
report.anonymousHelp: Your name will not be stored with this report (sensitive types only).
report.offlineHint: If you are offline, the report is saved and sent when you reconnect.
report.savedOffline: Report saved. It will send when you are back online.
report.draftSynced: A saved report has now been sent.

track.title: My reports
track.emptyTitle: You haven't filed any reports yet.
track.emptyHelp: Tap the report button to begin.
